notes: Fixed corpus for prompt evaluation. Items modeled after real canary/smoke-test data from 2026-04-23. NEVER touch these once the scorer runs — scoring comparisons require identical inputs. If you need new cases, ADD, don't modify. 20 items = good balance of signal vs speed/cost.

items.title: [Issue] Add Notion-like block-based editor
items.content: We've had multiple users request a block-based editor similar to Notion. Current rich text is limiting for long-form content. Would help with documentation flows. Willing to sponsor if this is on roadmap.

items.title: [Issue] OAuth callback 401 intermittently
items.content: Hitting a 401 on ~10% of OAuth callbacks. Repro: login via Google, succeed, refresh token 30min later, random 401s. Logs show valid signature but rejected. Tried clearing session, same issue.

items.title: Show HN: I built a SaaS monitoring tool — Kaulby alternative
items.content: After frustration with existing tools, I built a competitor-monitoring tool at half the price. Does real-time Reddit + HN + GitHub. Would love feedback from the HN community.

items.title: Anyone else find Kaulby's pricing weird?
items.content: Signed up for the Solo plan but the keyword limits seem arbitrary. Why 3 keywords on free but unlimited on paid? Feels like artificial constraint.

items.title: Is Inngest getting acquired by Vercel?
items.content: Heard rumors at a recent meetup. Can anyone from either team confirm or deny? Worried about continued OSS support if true.

items.title: [Issue] Migration guide for moving from Cron to Inngest
items.content: Working on docs for our team's migration. Inngest has been fantastic — the developer experience for background jobs is night and day. Writing a blog post too. Would it be OK to link your docs?

items.title: Brand24 vs Awario vs Kaulby — comparing after 2 weeks
items.content: Spent 2 weeks trialing all three. TL;DR: Brand24 has better analytics, Awario wider coverage, Kaulby the cleanest UX but missing some platforms. Pricing: Kaulby wins at low volume, Brand24 at scale. Posting detailed comparison tomorrow.

items.title: [Issue] Slack integration would be killer
items.content: Would pay extra for native Slack alerts on top of the email ones. Current webhook is fine but needs too much setup. Anyone else?

items.title: Kaulby down? Monitors not running since 3pm EST
items.content: My dashboards show no new results in 2 hours despite enabled monitors. Status page shows green but clearly broken. Is this a known issue?

items.title: Stack for my indie SaaS
items.content: Building my second SaaS. Stack: Next.js, Postgres, Clerk for auth, Resend for email, Inngest for background jobs, Kaulby for competitor monitoring. All solid choices so far.

items.title: [Issue] [P2-3] Failure Summary, Retry, and Cancellation Semantics
items.content: Per the platform RFC: need to define exact semantics for partial failures in our async build pipeline. Inngest provides retries but cancellation semantics unclear. Blocking tasks: nothing yet, but will block launch if not resolved.

items.title: Evaluating competitor-monitoring tools with $500/mo budget
items.content: Small agency, 3-4 brands to track. Need monitoring for Reddit + review sites. Budget is ~$500/mo. Looking at Brand24 and Awario mostly, Kaulby on the shortlist. Any real user input?

items.title: Ask HN: What background job system for serverless?
items.content: Starting new Next.js project on Vercel. Need reliable cron + retries + observability. Considering Inngest, Trigger.dev, and QStash. What's the HN consensus in 2026?

items.title: [Issue] MCP tools fail with Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'def')
items.content: Zod v3/v4 mismatch in @inngest/agent-kit. Reproduction: npm init fresh, install inngest-agent-kit, use with Zod 4. Stack trace attached. Fix: upgrade their internal Zod schema factory.

items.title: Cancelling Kaulby after 2 months
items.content: Great tool but didn't justify the cost for my solo side-project. The Day Pass would have been perfect but by the time I realized, I'd already committed to a monthly. Moving to a free alternative until my volume justifies paid again.

items.title: Show HN: pgflow — workflows in Postgres, no external services
items.content: Tired of vendor lock-in from Inngest/Trigger. Built pgflow: a workflow engine that lives in your existing Postgres. Zero ops overhead, open source, production-ready. Looking for feedback.

items.title: [Issue] Documentation: typo in pricing page
items.content: Small typo on pricing page — 'Solo tier include 10 monitors' should be 'includes'. Trivial fix.

items.title: Best tool for brand monitoring in 2026?
items.content: Marketing director here, budget approved for Q2. Need a tool that covers Reddit (priority), Twitter, review sites. Team of 4 will use it. Mention-is-too-simple, Brand24-is-overkill. What are you using?

items.title: My weekend project hit $1K MRR thanks to Kaulby
items.content: Small indie dev here. Used Kaulby's Reddit monitoring to catch my target users discussing pain points in real time. Built the product directly from those threads. Hit $1K MRR in 6 weeks. Just wanted to say thanks.

items.title: Brandwatch too expensive, alternatives?
items.content: Our team uses Brandwatch but renewal is $25K/year. Looking for similar capabilities at maybe 20% the cost. Mentioned Brand24 in a meeting, someone said they tried Kaulby and liked it. Thoughts?
